cases.prompt: Summarize this week's production incident with impact, timeline, mitigation, and follow-ups.
cases.response:
## Incident Summary

### Impact
- Elevated API latency and intermittent 5xx responses for 19 minutes.

### Timeline
- 13:02 UTC deploy started
- 13:07 UTC error rate increase detected
- 13:21 UTC rollback completed

### Mitigation
- Rolled back canary and scaled read replicas.

### Follow-up Actions
- Add alert for p95 latency regression.
- Tighten rollout guardrails.

Sources:
- https://status.example.com/incidents/abc123
- https://app.datadoghq.com/dashboard/incident-latency
- https://github.com/example/openclaw/actions/runs/12345
